{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Deepstrider blood
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] possesses [[Deepstrider blood]] which allows her to heal.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
